verses.1: The heavens declare the glory of God.
verses.2: Day after day they pour out speech,
verses.3: There is no speech nor language
verses.4: Their voice has gone out through all the earth,
verses.5: which is as a bridegroom coming out of his room,
verses.6: His going out is from the end of the heavens,
verses.7: The LORD’s law is perfect, restoring the soul.
verses.8: The LORD’s precepts are right, rejoicing the heart.
verses.9: The fear of the LORD is clean, enduring forever.
verses.10: They are more to be desired than gold, yes, than much fine gold,
verses.11: Moreover your servant is warned by them.
verses.13: Keep back your servant also from presumptuous sins.
verses.14: Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart
